subtitle.ja: 左手の親指と小指に糸をかけて始めます。左手親指の手前の糸を、右手親指と小指で取ります
subtitle.en: Begin with the string on the left thumb and little finger. With the right thumb and little finger, pick up the near left thumb string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で、手のひらの糸を取り合います
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, pick up each other’s palm strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の輪に、4本の指を上から入れて親指の糸を移します。取った糸は小指の向こう側に落ちます
subtitle.en: Insert the four fingers down into the thumb loops on both hands and transfer the thumb strings; the taken strings fall to the far side of the little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、人差し指の手前の糸と中指の手前の糸を持ち上げ、指先を向こう側に向けて完成です
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, lift the near index-finger and near middle-finger strings, and point the fingertips away to complete the figure.
